title: RSW Christmas Santa & Friends Kids Dinner Set – 3 Piece Tableware Set with Plate, Bowl & Cup – Festive Santa & Reindeer Design – Perfect for Children
features: 3-PIECE KIDS DINNER SET – Includes plate, bowl, and cup – perfect for children learning to eat on their own
FESTIVE SANTA & FRIENDS DESIGN – Cheerful navy background with Santa and reindeer prints makes mealtimes more fun
DURABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT – Made from strong PP material that’s ideal for daily use at home, nursery, or outdoors
EASY TO CLEAN – Wash before first use – not suitable for microwave or dishwasher to keep colours bright
IDEAL CHRISTMAS GIFT – A practical and festive gift for toddlers and young children this Christmas
description: Make mealtimes extra special this festive season with the RSW Santa & Friends Kids Christmas Dinner Set. This adorable 3-piece set is perfect for encouraging little ones to eat independently while adding a touch of Christmas magic to your table. Each set includes a 21 cm plate, 16.5 cm bowl, and 7 x 11 cm cup, all featuring a cheerful Santa and reindeer design against a navy background with red star borders. The set is made from durable PP material, making it lightweight yet sturdy enough for everyday use. It’s ideal for breakfast, lunch, and dinner throughout December – or anytime your child wants a bit of festive fun. The set is easy to clean, though it is recommended to wash before first use and avoid microwave or dishwasher cleaning to preserve the bright, colourful print. Suitable for home, nursery, or outdoor picnics, this dinner set is a must-have for parents who want to bring joy to their child’s meals and create magical Christmas memories.
